People say being a poet is hard. Not really. They just haven't fallen in love yet.
If I had been born a thousand years ago, I would still have waited for you.
You know why I always look up when I'm trying to memorise something? Because every time I close my eyes, I see your face.
Strange how just hearing your name can make my heart ache like an open wound.
If being a hero is easy, try being the hero of your heart.
If heroes wear armour, I have none — because I am willing to be pierced by your love.
If you made them happy and they still chose someone else, maybe you just were not rich enough yet.
You are like a box of coloured pencils — you bring colour to every day of my life.
If you were an angel, I would break all your wings so you could never go back to heaven.
Heroes fight for their country. That makes me one too — I am fighting for our future.
You are like a superhero — you effortlessly tore down every wall around my heart.
If heroes are remembered, you will never be just a memory — you will always be here.
I enjoy any meal — as long as I am sharing it with you.
If you were a guitar string, I would never learn to play — I could never risk snapping you.
I am like a ceiling fan: I look left, I look right, but I always end up in the same place — loving you.
If I were a member of parliament, I would be a terrible one — because I always think of you instead of the people.
My phone battery dies. My feelings for you never do.
I am a model student — every day I study how to love you with my whole heart.
Look at my garden, full of flowers. Look at your eyes — and my heart blooms.
Without you, music would just be noise.
I do not need a map. My heart always points to you.
You are not a chapter in my life. You are the whole story.
They say absence makes the heart grow fonder. In your case, it makes me text you every five minutes.
I used to believe in coincidences. Then I met you, and I believe in fate.
You make my favourite song sound even better.
If love is a journey, I do not need a destination — being with you is enough.
You are the reason I smile at my phone in public and look like an idiot.
I searched for the right words to describe how I feel about you. I found none — you are beyond description.
You are not perfect. But somehow you are exactly what I need.
Even the stars are jealous of the way your eyes shine.
Loving you is the easiest habit I have ever picked up and the hardest I could ever break.
You walked into my life and rearranged all the furniture — in the best possible way.
I used to think love was complicated. Then you made it feel simple.
My heart has a saved location. It is wherever you are.
If loving you is wrong, I do not want to be right.
You are my favourite notification.
Some people search their whole lives for what I found in you.
I did not believe in forever — until I met you.
You make rainy days my favourite because they mean staying in with you.
I love you not because you are perfect, but because you are perfect to me.
